BatchCreateUser.description: Grants permission to batch create users in a Wickr network

BatchDeleteUser.description: Grants permission to batch delete users from a Wickr network

BatchLookupUserUname.description: Grants permission to batch lookup user unames in a Wickr network

BatchReinviteUser.description: Grants permission to batch reinvite users in a Wickr network

BatchResetDevicesForUser.description: Grants permission to batch reset devices for a user in a Wickr network

BatchToggleUserSuspendStatus.description: Grants permission to batch toggle user suspend status in a Wickr network

CreateAdminSession.description: Grants permission to create and manage Wickr networks

CreateBot.description: Grants permission to create a bot in a Wickr network

CreateDataRetentionBot.description: Grants permission to create a data retention bot in a Wickr network

CreateDataRetentionBotChallenge.description: Grants permission to create a data retention bot challenge in a Wickr network

CreateNetwork.description: Grants permission to create a new Wickr network

CreateSecurityGroup.description: Grants permission to create a security group in a Wickr network

DeleteBot.description: Grants permission to delete a bot from a Wickr network

DeleteDataRetentionBot.description: Grants permission to delete a data retention bot from a Wickr network

DeleteNetwork.description: Grants permission to delete Wickr networks

DeleteSecurityGroup.description: Grants permission to delete a security group from a Wickr network

GetBot.description: Grants permission to get bot information in a Wickr network

GetBotsCount.description: Grants permission to get bot count for a Wickr network

GetDataRetentionBot.description: Grants permission to get data retention bot information in a Wickr network

GetGuestUserHistoryCount.description: Grants permission to get guest user history count for a Wickr network

GetNetwork.description: Grants permission to get details of a Wickr network

GetNetworkSettings.description: Grants permission to get network settings for a Wickr network

GetOidcInfo.description: Grants permission to get OIDC information for a Wickr network

GetSecurityGroup.description: Grants permission to get security group information in a Wickr network

GetUser.description: Grants permission to get information about a user in a Wickr network

GetUsersCount.description: Grants permission to get user count for a Wickr network

ListBlockedGuestUsers.description: Grants permission to list blocked guest users in a Wickr network

ListBots.description: Grants permission to list bots in a Wickr network

ListDevicesForUser.description: Grants permission to list devices for a user in a Wickr network

ListGuestUsers.description: Grants permission to list guest users in a Wickr network

ListNetworks.description: Grants permission to list Wickr networks

ListSecurityGroupUsers.description: Grants permission to list users in a security group in a Wickr network

ListSecurityGroups.description: Grants permission to list security groups in a Wickr network

ListTagsForResource.description: Grants permission to list the tags applied to a Wickr resource

ListUsers.description: Grants permission to list users in a Wickr network

RegisterOidcConfig.description: Grants permission to register OIDC configuration for a Wickr network

RegisterOidcConfigTest.description: Grants permission to test OIDC configuration for a Wickr network

TagResource.description: Grants permission to add tags to a specified Wickr resource

UntagResource.description: Grants permission to untag the specified tags from the specified Wickr resource

UpdateBot.description: Grants permission to update a bot in a Wickr network

UpdateDataRetention.description: Grants permission to update data retention settings in a Wickr network

UpdateGuestUser.description: Grants permission to update guest user status in a Wickr network

UpdateNetworkDetails.description: Grants permission to update Wickr network details

UpdateNetworkSettings.description: Grants permission to update network settings for a Wickr network

UpdateSecurityGroup.description: Grants permission to update a security group in a Wickr network

UpdateUser.description: Grants permission to update user information in a Wickr network

aws:RequestTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by a tag's key and value in a request

aws:ResourceTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by the tag key-value pairs attached to the resource

aws:TagKeys.description: Filters access by the tag keys in a request
